'''wathuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanido|cyanido]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanido|cyanido]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wathuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæthikith|wæthikith]] || [[word:wæthikij|wæthikij]] || [[word:wæthikish|wæthikish]] || [[word:wæthiki|wæthiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wathuthukuth|wathuthukuth]] || [[word:wathuthukuj|wathuthukuj]] || [[word:wathuthukush|wathuthukush]] || [[word:wathuthuku|wathuthuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wathukuth|wathukuth]] || [[word:wathukuj|wathukuj]] || [[word:wathukush|wathukush]] || [[word:wathuku|wathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wathufkufth|wathufkufth]] || [[word:wathufkufj|wathufkufj]] || [[word:wathufkufsh|wathufkufsh]] || [[word:wathufkuf|wathufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wathukuthu|wathukuthu]] || [[word:wathukuju|wathukuju]] || [[word:wathukushu|wathukushu]] || [[word:wathukuku|wathukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wathukuth|wathukuth]] || [[word:wathukuj|wathukuj]] || [[word:wathukush|wathukush]] || [[word:wathuku|wathuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wathukuthul|wathukuthul]] || [[word:wathukujul|wathukujul]] || [[word:wathukushul|wathukushul]] || [[word:wathukukul|wathukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wathukuuthuthu|wathukuuthuthu]] || [[word:wathukuujuju|wathukuujuju]] || [[word:wathukuushushu|wathukuushushu]] || [[word:wathukuuku|wathukuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wathukuthun|wathukuthun]] || [[word:wathukujun|wathukujun]] || [[word:wathukushun|wathukushun]] || [[word:wathukukun|wathukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wathukuthuoro|wathukuthuoro]] || [[word:wathukujuoro|wathukujuoro]] || [[word:wathukushuoro|wathukushuoro]] || [[word:wathukukuoro|wathukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|307a66b}}
